entities.name: HUNGER
entities.description: The state of suffering from lack of food

entities.name: FOOD SECURITY
entities.description: The state of having reliable access to a sufficient quantity of affordable, nutritious food

entities.name: NUTRITION
entities.description: The process of providing or obtaining the food necessary for health and growth

entities.name: SUSTAINABLE AGRICULTURE
entities.description: Farming practices that meet current food needs without compromising future generations

entities.name: FOOD ENVIRONMENTS
entities.description: The physical, economic, political, and socio-cultural environment that shapes food choices and eating behaviors

entities.name: SUSTAINABLE HEALTHY DIETS
entities.description: Diets that promote all dimensions of health and wellbeing and have low environmental impact

entities.name: LOW AND MIDDLE-INCOME COUNTRIES
entities.description: Countries with low to middle per capita income levels

entities.name: SYSTEM-LEVEL THINKING
entities.description: An approach to problem solving that views problems as part of an overall system

entities.name: SYSTEMIC APPROACH
entities.description: A method of addressing a problem by considering the entire system rather than individual parts

entities.name: MEASURES OF FOOD AND NUTRITION ENVIRONMENTS
entities.description: Valid and reliable tools used to quantify and analyze food and nutrition environments

entities.name: DETERMINANTS OF FOOD DEMAND
entities.description: Factors that influence the demand for food products

entities.name: FOOD SYSTEMS
entities.description: The entire range of actors and their interlinked activities to produce, process, transport, and consume food

relationships.source: MEASURES OF FOOD AND NUTRITION ENVIRONMENTS
